product.positioning: Shared 30-day acute assistance for a verified Network School household, with family aggregate and per-event caps.

tiers.label: Shared family aggregate
tiers.trigger: Eligible acute event for a named covered household member inside the active 30-day window.

tiers.label: Per-person maximum
tiers.trigger: Maximum payable for one covered household member during the active 30-day window.

tiers.label: Per-event maximum
tiers.trigger: Maximum payable for one acute event in the covered household.

coveredWhen: Sudden acute illness or injury occurs after activation and inside the 30-day window.
The household member was named at activation.
The event is documented by receipt, invoice, provider note, or other acceptable evidence.
The care type fits acute clinic, pharmacy, urgent care, ER consult, or stabilization within cap.
evidenceRequired: member wallet or pseudonymous member ID
confirmation that symptoms or event started after activation
exclusions: routine pediatric checkups, vaccines, preventive care, and chronic pediatric conditions
routine, preventive, elective, dental, vision, maternity, fertility, mental health, cosmetic, and long-term rehabilitation care
intoxication-related events, illegal activity, fraud, high-risk sport without add-on, and professional sport
USA or Canada treatment at launch
evacuation, repatriation, trip cancellation, baggage, delay, and liability

claimsTrustModel.phase0: OmegaX Health operator-backed oracle review with raw health evidence kept off-chain.
claimsTrustModel.phase1: Next phase: Discord/member verifier and claim recommendation automation with operator override.
claimsTrustModel.phase2: Roadmap: partner claims review and licensed carrier or fronted capacity for broader products.

premium.reserveRole: Collected 30-day member premiums attributed to NS Acute Assist Family Core 30.

liquidity.reserveRole: Posted acute-pool capital allocated to approved NS Acute Assist Family Core 30 obligations.

issuanceControls.reserveAttribution: Only posted acute-pool capital and collected premiums count as claims-paying reserve; token treasury marks do not count without a disclosed haircut.
issuanceControls.publicStatusRule: Keep this as a Network School-only limited pilot. Do not present it as official Network School coverage, Superteam coverage, broad public insurance, or guaranteed payout insurance.
issueWhen: Network School membership verification has succeeded through the off-chain Discord/member verifier.
The member activates the 30-day window before symptoms, injury, or the acute event.
Usable claim-paying reserve supports the active Cohort 0 product ladder and aggregate payout cap.
Claims operators can review evidence manually above the fast-lane threshold.
pauseWhen: Discord or Network School membership verification is unavailable, unconfigured, or stale.
Paid claims exceed 50% of the monthly payout cap or hit the hard aggregate cap.
Any Family Core 30 claim exceeds the fast-lane threshold of 500 USD without manual review.
One Family Core claim exceeds 2000 USD before at least 100 paid policies or households are active.
Provider evidence, pricing, reserve controls, or public terms drift from the published metadata.
